flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Duke University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($60.2k → $68.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Duke University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($60.2k → $68.8k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Duke University rose 13% between 2017 and 2020 ($11.5k → $13.0k).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Duke University are 114% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($97.8k vs $45.7k).
